description: Booklet of accounts, the binding is intact. Dated in the sixth image as Tuesday 18 Iyyar [..]93 AM, which is likely [55]93 based on the paleography. Further confirmation emerges from the fact that in 5593 AM, 18 Iyyar indeed fell on a Tuesday– which was not the case in 5493 (the other plausible year based on the paleography). Many of the accounts are dated according to the weekly Parsha readings, as is the case with many communal accounts, however, it seems more likely that these are private business transactions. Shops (דוכאן) are mentioned throughout the booklet, as are אסתגראר transactions (credit-related debts on goods). Requires further examination. MCD.
description_he: חוברת חשבונות עם כריכה שלמה. מתוארכת ל-18 באייר [ה']תקצ'ג (יום שלישי). רוב החשבונות מתוארכים לפי פרשות השבוע, אך נראה שמדובר בעסקאות פרטיות. חנויות (דוכאן) מוזכרות לאורך החוברת, וכן עסקאות אסתגראר (חובות אשראי על סחורות). דורש בחינה נוספת.
